creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Hello,

i checked this PR and the actual port version. Currently there is a run dependency to security/gnome-keyring.

From the current port Makefile and the changes done since this PR i would say, this problem has already been solved.

But it would be very helpful if one of you two reporter can give feedback, if the problem is really solved.

Greetings,
Torsten
